visual_analysis.description: A green soda can with 'Sprite' written on it, located on the left side of the shelf.
A black soda can to the right of the green can.
A red soda can with 'Coca-Cola' written on it, located in the middle.
A white soda can with 'Milkis' written on it, to the right of the red can.
A brown plastic bottle with a light blue cap, on the far right.

action_plan.explanation: The user requested 'sprite', which corresponds to the green soda can. It is unobstructed and can be picked directly.
